title: Efficacy of Compound X in the db/db Mouse Model of Type 2 Diabetes
randomization: Computer-generated block randomization (block size 6) stratified by baseline body weight
blinding: Operators and outcome assessors blinded; pharmacy prepares coded dosing solutions
primary_endpoint: Fasting blood glucose reduction at Day 28 versus baseline
inclusion_criteria: No overt illness on intake exam
exclusion_criteria: Failed sample collection despite two attempts

procedures.euthanasia: CO2 asphyxiation followed by secondary method

statistical_methods: Normality (Shapiro–Wilk), homogeneity (Levene). One-way ANOVA with Tukey’s HSD for parametric data; Kruskal–Wallis with Dunn’s for non-parametric. Two-sided alpha=0.05.

ethics.committee: Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC)
humane_endpoints: Severe distress or inability to ambulate

reporting.data_sharing: Raw data and analysis code available upon reasonable request
